attributes.description: Alerts when `zookeeper.data_tree.size > 1 GB`. Unbounded growth stresses heap and causes GC pauses.
attributes.name: [ZooKeeper OTel] Data tree size excessive

investigation_guide.blob:
## ZooKeeper data tree size excessive

### What fired
Peak data tree size exceeded 1 GB during the window.

### Why it matters
ZooKeeper holds its data tree in memory. Very large trees mean long startup, heavy GC, and latency spikes.

### Triage
1. Identify which znode subtrees are largest.
2. Check client write patterns.

### Remediation
- Clean up obsolete znodes.
- Grow heap if legitimately needed.

### Tuning
- 1 GB threshold; tune to heap size.
